steps.title: Find $\tfrac{11}{4}x + 6y$
steps.content: Compute: $\tfrac{11}{4}(8)+6(9)=22+54=76$. That matches the correct answer — D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above is 76. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
